overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence through a dark, atmospheric indoor facility blending traditional Japanese architecture with cyberpunk neon aesthetics. The player character moves through narrow corridors, a green-lit atrium with glass partitions, and ends in a gym training area with weight equipment and tatami mats, characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077's visual style.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow dark corridor with traditional wooden architecture and blue neon accents

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dimly lit narrow corridor with wooden walls and blue neon strip lighting

notable_agents.action: standing near the wall in a white shirt, visible briefly as the camera passes

entered.detail: continuous blue neon light strip running along the left wall at waist height
dark wooden traditional Japanese style wall paneling
square illuminated paper lantern hanging from the ceiling
traditional wooden archway marking the corridor exit

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, dark corridor with traditional Japanese wooden architecture illuminated by blue neon strip lights. The player walks forward through the enclosed space, passing a stationary NPC near the wall, with paper lanterns providing warm accent lighting against the cool blue neon.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern atrium lobby with green neon lighting and glass plant partitions

events.description: exits narrow wooden corridor into a wider modern atrium with prominent green neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through a modern lobby area with glass walls and green ambient lighting, passing by indoor plants

entered.detail: large glass partition walls with metal frames containing indoor plants
green neon strip lighting running along the ceiling edges creating ambient glow
tall palm plants visible behind the glass partitions
illuminated digital advertisement screen on the far wall
scattered trash and debris on the floor near the right wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the narrow corridor into a wider modern atrium characterized by green neon ceiling lighting and large glass partitions housing indoor plants. The space feels more open with concrete floors and scattered debris, marking a shift from traditional to cyberpunk modern architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor gym and training facility with tatami mats and weightlifting equipment

events.description: enters gym training area with visible weightlifting equipment and tatami floor mats
slows down and approaches an elevator door with an interaction prompt appearing on screen

agents.ego_description: exploring the gym facility, walking past weight equipment and approaching an elevator at the far end

notable_agents.action: sitting on a bench near the vending machine, looking at a handheld device

entered.detail: heavy barbell with weight plates resting on the tatami mats
tall red punching bag hanging from the ceiling
brightly lit vending machine with colorful advertisements
traditional Japanese tatami mat flooring covering the gym area
metal elevator doors with a digital interface panel
poster on the right wall depicting athletic imagery

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a spacious indoor gym with tatami mat flooring and scattered weightlifting equipment including barbells and dumbbells. A red punching bag hangs on the left while a vending machine glows in the corner near a seated NPC. The player approaches an elevator door at the far end, where a UI interaction prompt appears, indicating a potential transition to another area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark facility that transforms from a traditional Japanese corridor into a modern cyberpunk gym. It begins in a narrow, enclosed hallway where blue neon strips and warm paper lanterns illuminate wooden architecture as the camera passes a stationary figure. As the space opens up, the scene shifts into a wide atrium characterized by green neon ceiling lights, concrete floors, and large glass partitions housing indoor plants. The environment then expands further into a spacious training area featuring tatami mat flooring, scattered weightlifting equipment, and a glowing vending machine. Finally, the camera moves past a red punching bag toward an elevator door at the far end, where a UI interaction prompt appears.
